title: 2026 Oscar Winners for Hair, Makeup, Costume & Production Design | The Set Set
text: The Academy honored exceptional craft work across multiple categories on March 15, 2026. Frankenstein emerged as the dominant winner, achieving a rare sweep across three categories. For Best Makeup and Hairstyling, the winner was Frankenstein with Mike Hill, Jordan Samuel, and Cliona Furey. Other nominees included teams from Kokuho, Sinners, The Smashing Machine, and The Ugly Stepsister. For Best Costume Design, Kate Hawley's work on Frankenstein took the top prize. The competition included designs from Avatar: Fire and Ash, Hamnet, Marty Supreme, and Sinners. For Best Production Design, Frankenstein also won this category, with Tamara Deverell and Shane Vieau receiving recognition. The nominees represented the year's major films including Hamnet, Marty Supreme, One Battle After Another, and Sinners. The 2026 ceremony reflected strong recognition for auteur filmmaking, with winners including Ryan Coogler's Sinners and Chloé Zhao's Hamnet.
